title: Create: Packagers PSI Compat
description: Allows Create packagers to interact with PSI (Portable storage interfaces)
body:
Create: Packagers PSI Compat is a server-side (but client-side is also recommended) create addon which allows PSI (Portable Storage Interfaces) to connect with packagers.
By default this feature is blocked by create, so this mod re-adds the compatibility.
Simply attach your Create's Packager to the Portable Storage Interface and it will allow to Pack/Unpack items into your contraption storage.

**Note:** If the mod is installed only on the server, a message `Packagers cannot interface with Portable Storage Interface directly` will show in your action bar.
The reason for this is the message is sent from the client and not from the server, so don't worry, it will work anyways.
You can still install the mod on your client if you dont like this message popping up.
